document.description: One technical row per customer represented in the ClickHouse demo dataset.
inappropriate_use: Treat synthetic names or emails as real customer contact data.
purpose: Support customer-level analysis in the demo dataset.
security: Treat email and full_name as sensitive-looking data even though this fixture is synthetic.
document.summary: The Customers table contains one technical row per demo customer, keyed by a stable UUID (customer_id). Each row records the UTC creation timestamp (created_at), synthetic email and display name (both marked synthetic PII), and a business segment value (retail, premium, or enterprise). The grain is one row per customer_id, intended for joining orders to customers via customer_id. Data are synthetic; email and names must not be used as real contact data. Reviewers should confirm segment assignment rules, dataset freshness, and the uniqueness of customer_id.
